Localization.Description: DBMS login under an account from the Applications_Significant_Users tabular list is detected

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: A user from host {src.host} made an attempt to log in to a DBMS on host {event_src.host} under the account {subject.account.name} from the Applications_Significant_Users tabular list
A user from host {src.host} logged in to a DBMS on host {event_src.host} under the account {subject.account.name} from the Applications_Significant_Users tabular list
